summary: P3 Features Testing Complete - Sales Alerts System and AdvancedSearch on Customers/Suppliers pages. All 15 backend tests passed. All frontend components verified via UI testing.

issues: Console warning about <tr> being child of <span> in HTML - hydration warning but does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Sales Alerts API correctly implements all CRUD operations with authentication
AdvancedSearch component reused properly on Customers and Suppliers pages
Sales Alerts page shows prediction preview with historical comparison
Threshold slider correctly configured with 5-50% range
Email and WhatsApp toggles work independently
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 features fully functional. Sales Alerts page at /sales-alerts with config/preview/history APIs. Customers page has AdvancedSearch with Branch and Credit Balance filters. Suppliers page has AdvancedSearch with Branch, Category, and Credit Balance filters. All sidebar links correctly placed.

sales_alerts_page_loads.details: Page loads with title 'Sales Alerts' and prediction preview card

sales_alerts_get_config.details: Returns config with enabled, threshold_percentage, alert_time, email_enabled, whatsapp_enabled, recipients fields

sales_alerts_save_config.details: Saves configuration and returns updated config

sales_alerts_preview.details: Returns prediction data with alert_needed, predicted_sales, historical_avg, difference_percentage

sales_alerts_history.details: Returns array of past alert records

sales_alerts_threshold_slider.details: Slider visible with 5-50% range, shows current value (20% by default)

sales_alerts_time_picker.details: Time input visible and accepts HH:MM format

sales_alerts_email_whatsapp_toggles.details: Both toggle switches visible and independently controllable

sales_alerts_recipients.details: Recipient input and add button work, recipients list displays

sales_alerts_sidebar_link.details: Sales Alerts link appears under Reports section in sidebar

customers_advanced_search.details: AdvancedSearch component with search input, Branch filter, Credit Balance range filters

suppliers_advanced_search.details: AdvancedSearch component with search input, Branch filter, Category filter, Credit Balance range filters

customers_branch_filter.details: Branch dropdown filter available in expanded filters panel

suppliers_category_filter.details: Category dropdown filter available in expanded filters panel

sales_alerts_authentication.details: All endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
